# BpxPro

> Pakistan's trusted betting exchange agent platform. Cricket, football, tennis, horse racing and live casino odds with personal WhatsApp agents and local payments (JazzCash, EasyPaisa, bank, crypto).

Site: https://www.bpexpro.com
Alternate: https://bpexpro.com

## Main pages

- [Home](https://www.bpexpro.com/): Live markets overview, register options, payments, FAQ
- [Blog](https://www.bpexpro.com/blog): Guides on cricket betting, deposits, PSL tips, and responsible play
- [Dashboard](https://www.bpexpro.com/dashboard): Logged-in betting exchange (requires account)
- [Login](https://www.bpexpro.com/login): Account login

## How to register

1. **Register with Agent** — open WhatsApp with your country agent and get an account set up.
2. **Register Myself** — create username/password on the site (self-register).
3. **App Download** — Android APK / install section on the home page (`#app`).

## Payments

- JazzCash
- EasyPaisa
- Bank transfer
- Crypto (USDT)

## Countries served

Pakistan (PK), UAE (AE), Saudi Arabia (SA), United Kingdom (GB)

## Contact

Use the on-site WhatsApp chat widget or the Contact section on the home page (`#contact`).

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://www.bpexpro.com/sitemap.xml)
- [Robots](https://www.bpexpro.com/robots.txt)
